sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: FBI Say Its 'Operation Level Up' Stopped Crypto Fraud Victims Losing $285 Million
feed.summary: The government initiative is attempting to lessen the estimated $3.9 billion in losses from crypto fraud seen in 2023 alone.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks Fell Today -- Is the Stock a Buy?
